title: Search launched for missing Knysna woman
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched an...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched an urgent search for 43-year-old Nokhanyo Mtshaulanga from New Rest in White Location, who went missing over the weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna police have launched an urgent search for 43-year-old Nokhanyo Mtshaulanga from New Rest in White Location, who went missing over the weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Mtshaulanga was reported as missing by next of kin. Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies confirmed that a missing persons case has been opened."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""Preliminary reports available suggest that the woman went to work in the central business district of Knysna on Saturday 1 November. She never arrived at work and did not return home," he said.","html":""Preliminary reports available suggest that the woman went to work in the central business district of Knysna on Saturday 1 November. She never arrived at work and did not return home," he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She was last seen in Grey Street in Knysna on Saturday, dressed in her work uniform."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone who may have information about her whereabouts is urged to contact Sergeant Thamsanqa Maqungo of Knysna Detectives on 044 302 6652 or 083 513 7559.","html":"Anyone who may have information about her whereabouts is urged to contact Sergeant Thamsanqa Maqungo of Knysna Detectives on 044 302 6652 or 083 513 7559."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Search launched for missing Knysna woman
